question: What is Mixture of Experts (MoE)? How does it achieve sparsity?
code_hint: MoE has multiple expert networks, router selects top-k experts per token, only k experts active
expected_output: MoE: Multiple expert networks, router selects top-k experts, only k active per token
template:
# MoE Architecture:
# - N expert networks (usually FFNs)
# - Router/Gate network predicts expert weights
# - Top-k experts selected per token
# - Sparse activation: only k out of N experts process each token

print("MoE: Multiple expert networks, router selects top-k experts, only k active per token")
answer:
# MoE Architecture:
# - N expert networks (usually FFNs)
# - Router/Gate network predicts expert weights
# - Top-k experts selected per token
# - Sparse activation: only k out of N experts process each token

print("MoE: Multiple expert networks, router selects top-k experts, only k active per token")
